175 return color;
176 }
177 return drawinfo.drawPlayer.GetImmuneAlphaPure(color, drawinfo.shadow);
178 }

418 drawinfo.DustCache.Add(num);

420 if (Main.rand.Next(40) == 0 && drawinfo.hatHair)
421 {

428 drawinfo.DustCache.Add(num2);

1229 // Token: 0x060038A8 RID: 14504 RVA: 0x0063F588 File Offset: 0x0063D788
1230 public static bool ShouldOverrideLegs_CheckPants(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
1231 {
1232 if (PlayerDrawLayers.ShouldOverrideLegs_CheckShoes(ref drawinfo))
1233 {
1234 return false;
1235 }
1236 int legs = drawinfo.drawPlayer.legs;
1237 if (legs <= 138)
1238 {
1239 if (legs <= 63)
1240 {
1241 if (legs != 55 && legs != 63)
1242 {
1243 return false;
1244 }
1245 }
1246 else if (legs != 67 && legs != 106 && legs != 138)
1247 {
1248 return false;
1249 }
1250 }
1251 else if (legs <= 217)
1252 {
1253 if (legs != 140 && legs != 143 && legs != 217)
1254 {
1255 return false;
1256 }
1257 }
1258 else if (legs != 222 && legs != 226 && legs != 228)
1259 {
1260 return false;
1261 }
1262 return true;
1263 }
1264
1265 // Token: 0x060038A9 RID: 14505 RVA: 0x0063F618 File Offset: 0x0063D818
1266 public static bool ShouldOverrideLegs_CheckShoes(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
1267 {
1268 sbyte shoe = drawinfo.drawPlayer.shoe;
1269 return shoe == 15;

4578 public static void DrawPlayer_TransformDrawData(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
4579 {
4580 float rotation = drawinfo.rotation;
4581 Vector2 vector = drawinfo.Position - Main.screenPosition + drawinfo.rotationOrigin;
4582 Vector2 vector2 = drawinfo.drawPlayer.position + drawinfo.rotationOrigin;
4583 Matrix matrix = Matrix.CreateRotationZ(drawinfo.rotation);
4584 for (int i = 0; i < drawinfo.DustCache.Count; i++)
4585 {
4586 Vector2 vector3 = Main.dust[drawinfo.DustCache[i]].position - vector2;
4587 vector3 = Vector2.Transform(vector3, matrix);
4588 Main.dust[drawinfo.DustCache[i]].position = vector3 + vector2;
4589 }
4590 for (int j = 0; j < drawinfo.GoreCache.Count; j++)
4591 {
4592 Vector2 vector4 = Main.gore[drawinfo.GoreCache[j]].position - vector2;
4593 vector4 = Vector2.Transform(vector4, matrix);
4594 Main.gore[drawinfo.GoreCache[j]].position = vector4 + vector2;
4595 }
4596 for (int k = 0; k < drawinfo.DrawDataCache.Count; k++)
4597 {
4598 DrawData drawData = drawinfo.DrawDataCache[k];
4599 if (!drawData.ignorePlayerRotation)
4600 {
4601 Vector2 vector5 = drawData.position - vector;
4602 vector5 = Vector2.Transform(vector5, matrix);
4603 drawData.position = vector5 + vector;
4604 drawData.rotation += drawinfo.rotation;
4605 drawinfo.DrawDataCache[k] = drawData;
4606 }
4607 }
4608 }

4610 // Token: 0x060038DF RID: 14559 RVA: 0x0064DC24 File Offset: 0x0064BE24
4611 public static void DrawPlayer_ScaleDrawData(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo, float scale)
4612 {
4613 if (scale == 1f)
4614 {
4615 return;
4616 }
4617 Vector2 vector = drawinfo.Position + drawinfo.drawPlayer.Size * new Vector2(0.5f, 1f) - Main.screenPosition;
4618 for (int i = 0; i < drawinfo.DrawDataCache.Count; i++)
4619 {
4620 DrawData drawData = drawinfo.DrawDataCache[i];
4621 Vector2 vector2 = drawData.position - vector;
4622 drawData.position = vector + vector2 * scale;
4623 drawData.scale *= scale;
4624 drawinfo.DrawDataCache[i] = drawData;
4625 }
4626 }

4628 // Token: 0x060038E0 RID: 14560 RVA: 0x0064DCD8 File Offset: 0x0064BED8
4629 public static void DrawPlayer_AddSelectionGlow(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
4630 {
4631 if (drawinfo.selectionGlowColor == Color.Transparent)
4632 {
4633 return;
4634 }
4635 Color selectionGlowColor = drawinfo.selectionGlowColor;
4636 List<DrawData> list = new List<DrawData>();
4637 list.AddRange(PlayerDrawLayers.GetFlatColoredCloneData(ref drawinfo, new Vector2(0f, -2f), selectionGlowColor));
4638 list.AddRange(PlayerDrawLayers.GetFlatColoredCloneData(ref drawinfo, new Vector2(0f, 2f), selectionGlowColor));
4639 list.AddRange(PlayerDrawLayers.GetFlatColoredCloneData(ref drawinfo, new Vector2(2f, 0f), selectionGlowColor));
4640 list.AddRange(PlayerDrawLayers.GetFlatColoredCloneData(ref drawinfo, new Vector2(-2f, 0f), selectionGlowColor));
4641 list.AddRange(drawinfo.DrawDataCache);
4642 drawinfo.DrawDataCache = list;
4643 }

4645 // Token: 0x060038E1 RID: 14561 RVA: 0x0064DD88 File Offset: 0x0064BF88
4646 public static void DrawPlayer_MakeIntoFirstFractalAfterImage(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
4647 {
4648 if (!drawinfo.drawPlayer.isFirstFractalAfterImage)
4649 {
4650 if (drawinfo.drawPlayer.HeldItem.type == 4722)
4651 {
4652 bool flag = drawinfo.drawPlayer.itemAnimation > 0;
4653 }
4654 return;
4655 }
4656 for (int i = 0; i < drawinfo.DrawDataCache.Count; i++)
4657 {
4658 DrawData drawData = drawinfo.DrawDataCache[i];
4659 drawData.color *= drawinfo.drawPlayer.firstFractalAfterImageOpacity;
4660 drawData.color.A = (byte)((float)drawData.color.A * 0.8f);
4661 drawinfo.DrawDataCache[i] = drawData;
4662 }
4663 }

4665 // Token: 0x060038E2 RID: 14562 RVA: 0x0064DE40 File Offset: 0x0064C040
4666 public static void DrawPlayer_RenderAllLayers(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
4667 {
4668 SpriteDrawBuffer spriteBuffer = Main.spriteBuffer;
4669 List<DrawData> drawDataCache = drawinfo.DrawDataCache;
4670 foreach (DrawData drawData in drawDataCache)
4671 {
4672 if (drawData.texture != null)
4673 {
4674 drawData.Draw(spriteBuffer);
4675 }
4676 }
4677 DrawData drawData2 = default(DrawData);
4678 int num = 0;
4679 for (int i = 0; i <= drawDataCache.Count; i++)
4680 {
4681 if (drawinfo.projectileDrawPosition == i)
4682 {
4683 if (drawData2.shader != 0)
4684 {
4685 Main.pixelShader.CurrentTechnique.Passes[0].Apply();
4686 }
4687 spriteBuffer.Unbind();
4688 PlayerDrawLayers.DrawHeldProj(drawinfo, drawinfo.SelectedDrawnProjectile);
4689 }
4690 if (i != drawDataCache.Count)
4691 {
4692 drawData2 = drawDataCache[i];
4693 if (drawData2.sourceRect == null)
4694 {
4695 drawData2.sourceRect = new Rectangle?(drawData2.texture.Frame(1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0));
4696 }
4697 PlayerDrawHelper.SetShaderForData(drawinfo.drawPlayer, drawinfo.cHead, ref drawData2);
4698 if (drawData2.texture != null)
4699 {
4700 spriteBuffer.DrawSingle(num++);
4701 }
4702 }
4703 }
4704 spriteBuffer.Unbind();
4705 Main.pixelShader.CurrentTechnique.Passes[0].Apply();
4706 }
4707
4708 // Token: 0x060038E3 RID: 14563 RVA: 0x0064DF94 File Offset: 0x0064C194
4709 private static void DrawHeldProj(PlayerDrawSet drawinfo, Projectile proj)
4710 {
4711 SamplerState samplerState = Main.graphics.GraphicsDevice.SamplerStates[0];
4712 Player player = Main.player[proj.owner];
4713 player.position += player.netOffset;
4714 proj.position += player.netOffset;
4715 try
4716 {
4717 Main.instance.DrawProjDirect(proj, drawinfo.drawPlayer);
4718 if (proj.type == 595 || proj.type == 735 || proj.type == 927)
4719 {
4720 Main.instance.DrawProjDirect(proj, drawinfo.drawPlayer);
4721 }
4722 }
4723 catch
4724 {
4725 proj.active = false;
4726 }
4727 player.position -= player.netOffset;
4728 proj.position -= player.netOffset;
4729 Main.graphics.GraphicsDevice.SamplerStates[0] = samplerState;
4730 }
4731
4732 // Token: 0x060038E4 RID: 14564 RVA: 0x0064E09C File Offset: 0x0064C29C
4733 public static void DrawPlayer_RenderAllLayersSlow(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo)
4734 {
4735 int num = -1;
4736 List<DrawData> drawDataCache = drawinfo.DrawDataCache;
4737 Effect pixelShader = Main.pixelShader;
4738 Projectile[] projectile = Main.projectile;
4739 SpriteBatch spriteBatch = Main.spriteBatch;
4740 for (int i = 0; i <= drawDataCache.Count; i++)
4741 {
4742 if (drawinfo.projectileDrawPosition == i)
4743 {
4744 if (num != 0)
4745 {
4746 pixelShader.CurrentTechnique.Passes[0].Apply();
4747 num = 0;
4748 }
4749 try
4750 {
4751 Main.instance.DrawProjDirect(drawinfo.SelectedDrawnProjectile, drawinfo.drawPlayer);
4752 }
4753 catch
4754 {
4755 drawinfo.SelectedDrawnProjectile.active = false;
4756 }
4757 }
4758 if (i != drawDataCache.Count)
4759 {
4760 DrawData drawData = drawDataCache[i];
4761 if (drawData.sourceRect == null)
4762 {
4763 drawData.sourceRect = new Rectangle?(drawData.texture.Frame(1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0));
4764 }
4765 PlayerDrawHelper.SetShaderForData(drawinfo.drawPlayer, drawinfo.cHead, ref drawData);
4766 num = drawData.shader;
4767 if (drawData.texture != null)
4768 {
4769 drawData.Draw(spriteBatch);
4770 }
4771 }
4772 }
4773 pixelShader.CurrentTechnique.Passes[0].Apply();
4774 }

4791 // Token: 0x060038E7 RID: 14567 RVA: 0x0064E20C File Offset: 0x0064C40C
4792 private static DrawData[] GetFlatColoredCloneData(ref PlayerDrawSet drawinfo, Vector2 offset, Color color)
4793 {
4794 int colorOnlyShaderIndex = ContentSamples.DyeShaderIDs.ColorOnlyShaderIndex;
4795 DrawData[] array = new DrawData[drawinfo.DrawDataCache.Count];
4796 for (int i = 0; i < drawinfo.DrawDataCache.Count; i++)
4797 {
4798 DrawData drawData = drawinfo.DrawDataCache[i];
4799 drawData.position += offset;
4800 drawData.shader = colorOnlyShaderIndex;
4801 drawData.color = color;
4802 array[i] = drawData;
4803 }
4804 return array;
4805 }
4806 }
4807}
